Vendored, verbatim, from the canonical upstream:

  Repository : https://github.com/UOR-Foundation/atlas-12288
  Commit     : aef42a6fd5c323373222b6362050b439690136a1  (pinned, see .pinned-commit)
  Retrieved  : 2026-06-10

These files are the AUTHORITY for Holo Atlas 96. Not one byte of the
Φ-Atlas-12288 / Prime Structure mathematics is re-implemented here; the
structure is ENCODED into the UOR substrate by content-addressing these
exact bytes (each appears in holospace.lock.json by its did:holo κ) and
projecting their documented invariants into a W3C semantic object
(../../atlas-12288.uor.jsonld). To re-verify any claim, re-hash the file.

Files (paths preserved from upstream):
  LICENSE                          — MIT license, verbatim
  ffi/c/minimal_wrapper.c          — the Lean-free, self-contained reference C (the math)
  ffi/c/uor_ffi.h                  — the C API surface + invariants (the spec, in comments)
  pkg/node/lib/index.js            — the Node binding: PhiCoordinate / ResonanceClass / Conservation
  pkg/node/lib/index.d.ts          — the typed API surface
  lean/UOR/Prime/Structure.lean    — Pages=48, Bytes=256, R96=96, classifyByte (the formal source)
  lean/UOR/Atlas/Core.lean         — the Φ-Atlas-12288 Core structure (boundary of the holographic bulk)
  docs/guides/mathematics.md       — the mathematical background (the prose spec)
